title: On Vital Statistics
content:
Ill fares the land to hast'ning ills a prey (1)
    Where wealth accumulates and men decay.'
    But how much more unfortunate are those
    Where wealth declines and population grows!

    (1)This line is execrable; and I note it.
    I quote it as the faulty poet wrote it.
meaning:
Hilaire Belloc's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "On Vital Statistics"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
